1797810.name: Fantasy Grounds - Monsters of Feyland
1797810.description:
Monsters of Feyland

Cawood Publishing presents 
Monsters of Feyland  for 5th Edition! 100 new monsters and lore about the land of the Fey. From the Doubt Trout to the Witch King, this is a unique collection. Featuring the incredible art of Travis Hanson.
Just around the corner... Beyond the stone gate... Through the mirror... Lies Feyland!
This product includes:
  •  Game Master advice about Feyland
  •  The Seelie and Unseelie Courts
  •  100 new 5E monsters with individual illustrations, stat blocks, and bios
  •  Fey, dragons, giants, undead, lycanthropes, beasts, and more
  •  CRs 1/8 to 25
  •  Fey flora
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Andrew Cawood
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and the included 5E Compatible ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
